MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Gordon C. Atkinson, Esq. and Whitty Somvichian, Esq. of COOLEY GODWARD LLP 693-2000 for defendants TERAYON COMMUNICATION SYSTEMS, INC. and IMEDIA CORPORATION demuring to the Third Amended Complaint and moving to strike portions thereof
Karen Kennard, Esq. and Ana E. Ayala, Esq. of McCUTCHEN, DOYLE 393-2000 for defendant EFRAIM ARAZI demurring to the Third Amended Complaint
William A. Logan, Esq. of LASKY, HAAS & COHLER 788-2700 for defendants GILL COGAN and WEISS, PECK & GREER joining on Terayon's motion to strike
Rodney R. Patula, Esq. of SQUIRE, SANDERS & DEMPSEY L.L.P. 954-0200 for Plaintiffs EVERGREEN CANADA ISRAEL MANAGEMENT LTD, GIZA PRIVATE INVESTMENTS (1997) LTD., and POALIM NECHASIM (Menayot) LTD. opposing party

Argued and the Court OVERRULED the demurrers. Motion to strike was GRANTED as to Causes of Action 1, 2, 4 and 8 and the Court is requiring Plaintiffs to strike all benefit of the bargain damages, whether they are benefit of the bargain damages or consequential damages from both causes of action. Mr. Padula to prepare an order conforming with this Court's ruling. However, counsel may submit proposed orders re Causes of Action 5 and 6. (cl)
Argument last over an hour and per diem fees assessed. $90 submitted from each side.

Patrick Heard, CSR 11055
